name: Bug report
about: Something is broken
labels: bug

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened, including any error messages.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Node: [e.g. 20.11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]

## Additional context
Paste relevant logs here (from backend terminal or browser console).
